name: @act-spec/example-707-eleventy-blog
description: PRD-707 reference example: Tinybox Blog — a flat chronological Eleventy 2.x blog (TS-impl counterpart to PRD-703 Hugo) that wires @act-spec/eleventy + @act-spec/markdown-adapter and validates clean against PRD-600 with achieved.level === 'standard'.

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-707-eleventy-blog: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-707-eleventy-blog: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
